allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's|href="#" id="aboutDropdown"|href="about.html" id="aboutDropdown"|g' index.html about.html accessibility.html commissions.html contact.html faqs.html privacy.html services.html terms.html)

Bash(sed -i '' 's|href="#" id="servicesDropdown"|href="services.html" id="servicesDropdown"|g' index.html about.html accessibility.html commissions.html contact.html faqs.html privacy.html services.html terms.html)

Bash(sed -i '' 's|href="#" id="commissionsDropdown"|href="commissions.html" id="commissionsDropdown"|g' index.html about.html accessibility.html commissions.html contact.html faqs.html privacy.html services.html terms.html)

Bash(sed -i '' 's|Images/Cedille and Co Footer Logo\\.png|Images/Cedille and Co Logo.png|g' about.html accessibility.html commissions.html contact.html faqs.html index.html privacy.html services.html terms.html thanks.html)

Bash(sed -i '' 's|class="footer-logo-large" src="Images/Cedille and Co Logo\\.png"|class="footer-logo-large" src="Images/Cedille and Co Footer Logo.png"|g' about.html accessibility.html commissions.html contact.html faqs.html index.html privacy.html services.html terms.html thanks.html)
